flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California Baptist University rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.2k → $12.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California Baptist University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.0k → $41.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at California Baptist University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.0k → $41.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California Baptist University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
